scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.dev: concurrently --names API,UI --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "pnpm --filter @workspace/software-city run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && PORT=${PORT:-3000} BASE_PATH=${BASE_PATH:-/} pnpm --filter @workspace/software-city run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.clean: find . -name 'dist' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; find . -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -exec rm {} + 2>/dev/null; echo done
